name: Supplier Contact Details
query:
SELECT
    s.name AS `Supplier:Link/Supplier:180`,
    s.supplier_name AS `Supplier Name::200`,
    s.pan AS `PAN::120`,
    s.gstin AS `GSTIN::140`,
    s.department AS `Department::140`,
    a.name AS `Address:Link/Address:200`,
    a.address_line1 AS `Address Line 1::200`,
    a.address_line2 AS `Address Line 2::200`,
    a.city AS `City::120`,
    a.state AS `State::120`,
    a.pincode AS `Pincode::100`,
    a.country AS `Country::120`,
    a.phone AS `Address Phone::140`,
    a.email_id AS `Email::200`,
    c.mobile_no AS `Mobile No::140`
FROM `tabSupplier` s
LEFT JOIN `tabDynamic Link` adl
    ON adl.link_doctype = 'Supplier'
    AND adl.link_name = s.name
    AND adl.parenttype = 'Address'
LEFT JOIN `tabAddress` a
    ON a.name = adl.parent
LEFT JOIN `tabDynamic Link` cdl
    ON cdl.link_doctype = 'Supplier'
    AND cdl.link_name = s.name
    AND cdl.parenttype = 'Contact'
LEFT JOIN `tabContact` c
    ON c.name = cdl.parent
WHERE s.disabled = 0
ORDER BY s.supplier_name
